title: Invero Set of 6 Fun Children’s Christmas Themed Plastic Festive Serving Tray - Stackable, Reusable Tableware Trays - Ideal for Kids Parties, Snacks, Lunches, Dinners and More (30cm x 19.2cm)
features: EXCELLENT MATERIAL - Food trays with a distinctive children's Christmas-themed plastic festive serving tray design are made of BPA-free, non-toxic, and 100% food-grade materials to help your holiday run smoothly.

ENJOY YOUR XMAS HOLIDAY - Upgrade your party to a whole new level to make it a memorable occasion. Christmas theme food trays will grant all of your aesthetic and enjoyable wishes while enabling you to spend quality time with your family and loved ones. Now you can host the perfect party and set the table of your dreams.

RELIABLE FOOD TRAY - This set of festive serving trays made of plastic comes with six meal platters. Given their size of 30 cm x 19.2 cm, the disposable trays can hold a substantial amount of food. They work well for healthy salads, desserts, and other dishes as well. Parties, snacks, meals, and snacks for children.

STACKABLE AND EASY TO CLEAN - The Set of 6 Plastic Festive Serving Tray in a Fun Children's Christmas Theme are stackable and won't take up much space in your cabinets. Additionally recyclable, you may wash them in warm water and soap.

VERSATILITY - Can also be used as a simple ornamental item or to store seasonal candles or napkins. Perfect for serving small snacks, giving as gifts, or using as festive holiday décor. When you end the year with this delightfully Fun Children's Christmas Themed Plastic Festive Serving Tray, you'll ensure enduring memories and cheer.
description: Product Description Invero Set of 6 Fun Children’s Christmas Themed Plastic Festive Serving Tray - Stackable, Reusable Tableware Trays Set of 6 Festive Serving Trays in Fun Children's Christmas Theme can be stacked to save cabinet space. Food trays with a children's Christmas-themed design are constructed of BPA-free, non-toxic, and 100% food-grade materials. These are wonderful options for gifts over the holiday season or as party favors.
